blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 28°F.
